nodes.label: AI as collaborative tool for product descriptions
nodes.grounding_span: I am more likely to collaborate through it

nodes.label: AI accuracy in product details
nodes.grounding_span: the AI description might add that it could be hand washed in hot water, which would be incorrect

nodes.label: AI-generated patterns feasibility
nodes.grounding_span: there has been a huge influx of AI-created 'patterns' that are either impossible to recreate or result in a product that is a jumbled mess

nodes.label: AI consistency across listings
nodes.grounding_span: the AI kept the formatting and general framework of each description uniform

nodes.label: Human creative authenticity vs AI homogenization
nodes.grounding_span: I worry that this will take the nuance and diversity out of artistic works

nodes.label: AI as brainstorming and framework tool
nodes.label_negative: AI as source of complete ideas
nodes.grounding_span: I try to limit my use of AI by keeping it a tool to hone my own brainstorming or to create a framework for me to build on

nodes.label: AI for tedious numerical tasks
nodes.grounding_span: My hope is that it will continue to be trained to work mathematics and numbers, so I could trust it to be able to take over more tedious tasks like calculating taxes and expense reports

nodes.label: Creative authenticity and personal voice
nodes.grounding_span: I edit that into something that sounds more my style

nodes.label: Accuracy and reliability in product information
Efficiency and consistency in listing creation
nodes.grounding_span: making what I felt was a satisfying connection that ran between each page of my online listings

nodes.label: Preservation of human creativity and diversity
nodes.grounding_span: I worry that this will take the nuance and diversity out of artistic works

nodes.label: Satisfaction with AI for consistent formatting
nodes.grounding_span: I was particularly satisfied when creating a batch of product descriptions for different items all at once

nodes.label: Frustration with AI erroneous additions
nodes.grounding_span: the AI description might add that it could be hand washed in hot water, which would be incorrect

nodes.label: Skepticism toward AI-generated patterns
nodes.grounding_span: there has been a huge influx of AI-created 'patterns' that are either impossible to recreate

nodes.label: Hope for AI to handle numerical tasks

nodes.label: Iterative refinement — starts with AI draft then edits for personal voice
nodes.grounding_span: I'll usually start be explaining the details... Once AI has generated product description text, I edit that into something that sounds more my style

nodes.label: Domain-specific skepticism — distrusts AI in pattern selection but trusts for formatting
